summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WordPress blog archive page (Insurance Tips section). All backend APIs and frontend UI features working correctly with proper responsive design and navigation.
passed_tests: Backend API GET /api/posts returns all 4 blog posts with correct pagination
Individual blog post retrieval by slug works for all 4 posts
Insurance Tips page loads correctly at /insurance-tips with proper h1 title
2-column grid layout displays correctly on desktop (1920px viewport)
All 4 blog cards show correct content: images, category badges, titles, excerpts, author, date, read time
Post 1: Tax-Advantaged Insurance Strategies with INSURANCE TIPS badge
Post 2: Hidden Costs of Cheap Insurance with INSURANCE TIPS badge
Post 3: Condo Insurance vs HOA Master Policy with HOME INSURANCE, SPECIALTY INSURANCE, INSURANCE TIPS badges
Post 4: Key Person Insurance with BUSINESS INSURANCE, SPECIALTY INSURANCE badges
Header navigation: Home link navigates to homepage
Header navigation: Insurance Tips link navigates to /insurance-tips
Header navigation: Quote Center and Get Quote buttons navigate to contact section
Mobile responsive: cards stack to 1 column at 375px viewport
